title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of designing and optimizing the wrapper architecture around AI coding agents. The harness comprises roughly 98% of a coding agent's value and operates at two levels: first, managing the AI layer for a single session through rules, skills, and hooks; second, orchestrating multiple agent sessions into focused workflows to reliably handle larger tasks.
